race.description: 2026 Coast2coast Grounds & Gardens Redcliffe Gold Cup (G2)
race.comment: FINAL DEADLINE NZ (9) has looked good in winning both starts since a spell, leading to score by 5m at Albion Park last week. Switches to a standing start but won well from this mark when resuming prior. Showed his class when second from wide barriers in the Chariots of Fire and Light Horse FFA in Sydney last campaign so he is ready for this level. PATH TO GREATNESS (2) made progress when second-up in the Listed Flashing Red last week, racing wide before settling outside the leader but sticking on well for third. Has won two of three tries here and has yet to miss a place in four third-up attempts, winning twice, so he should be close to his peak. FATE AWAITS (7) kicked of this campaign with a standing start success and won his lone try at this distance so the step up in trip should suit. PICCADILLY PETE NZ (4) finished in front of PATH TO GREATNESS when edged out of the Flashing Red and owns a good record at this distance. SPEAK THE TRUTH (12) goes well second up so can improve.
